name: Entity Comparison (WASM)
description: Side-by-side entity and version comparison tool. Compare two entities of the same type, two versions of the same entity, or an entity against its template.
author: BiloxiStudios

brains_root.label: Brains Repository Root
brains_root.description: Path to the Brains repository. Use environment variable BRAINS_ROOT or default to '.' (current directory)

diff_context_lines.label: Diff Context Lines
diff_context_lines.description: Number of context lines to show around each change in diffs
